item.title: src/ scaffold has server/ and ui/ dirs not in target architecture
item.intent: The target architecture spec must be the single source of truth for src/ layout. No scaffold directories that contradict it.
item.description: Empty scaffold dirs src/server/ and src/ui/ exist but are absent from target architecture in CLAUDE.md and ARCHITECTURE.md. Fix: update both docs to include src/server/ (Hono server for CQ-040) and src/ui/ (htmx assets). Doc-only change. Steps: 1. Update CLAUDE.md Key Source Layout — add src/server/ and src/ui/ with their purpose. 2. Update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md package structure to match. 3. Verify no other spec contradicts.
acceptanceCriteria: CLAUDE.md target architecture lists src/web/ with ownership (Hono + htmx, CQ-040)
No scaffold directory in src/ contradicts the spec
CQ-040 has an unambiguous target path in the architecture docs
